message:
fix(server): extract TuiDeferredWorkerProgress for idempotent worker startup and detach latch safety

TuiDeferredWorkerProgress:
- Extract atomic progress tracker with claim_non_db_start(), claim_db_start(),
  and claim_advisory_start() methods that use swap-based idempotency guards
- start_*_if_needed() convenience methods wrap claim + start pairs so workers
  are never double-started regardless of code path (normal startup, headless
  detach fallback, or thread spawn failure)
- TuiDeferredWorkerHandle bundles the thread JoinHandle with its progress
  tracker, replacing the bare Option<JoinHandle<()>>

Headless Detach Latch Safety:
- Detach branch now uses is_headless_detach_requested() (non-consuming check)
  to decide whether to enter the headless path, then calls
  take_headless_detach_requested() only after the deferred worker thread has
  been joined and all workers started -- preventing a race where the latch
  is consumed before startup-gated waiters have observed it
- New test: headless_detach_branch_check_does_not_consume_stop_latch verifies
  the non-consuming check leaves the latch visible for subsequent waiters

TUI Config Simplification:
- Remove explicit ActiveOnly tick strategy assignment (MailAppModel::init
  already installs the project-level tiered cadence strategy via
  Cmd::set_tick_strategy)
- Remove associated bootstrap comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
